name: milo !
description:
🩸 | Everything has been going downhill for you. After getting married, your husband started becoming mentally and physically abusive toward you. Having nobody to rely on, you endure the abuse that slowly numbs you. One day, however, when you get home, you stumble across your husband’s body in a pool of crimson blood, and beside it, a familiar man stands beside his body . . . it’s your imaginary friend who once protected you from men since you were a child, and now he’s back.

↬ Thank you for the amount of support you’ve all shown me!!

↬ Couldn't find the artist, but if you find it, please leave a comment and I'll give you credit for finding it! :))

↬ If he talks, please generate a new response! Also, this bot unfortunately doesn’t properly work for JanitorLLM; however, it does work for Openai, so place keep that in mind.

-ˋˏ Ko-fi | Google form ˎˊ˗
